creative_premise: Afterbell is not a page to consume but a room a visitor composes. Three or more echoes can now be folded into the URL itself, turning the address into a compact score that reopens the same visual constellation without an account, database, analytics layer, or server state.

identity_boundary.storage_model: URL fragment only; no network submission or personal identity

behavior: marks are normalized and capped before serialization
room interval geometry and signature are deterministic
three marks reveal a Fold this room control
folding writes a versioned base64url seed into the URL fragment
opening the seeded URL reconstructs the same room
invalid or oversized seeds fail closed and are removed
the room can be emptied without touching any server
keyboard controls remain available for placing, folding, and clearing echoes

verification.runtime: Node.js test runner executed against byte-identical module and test content before commit

claim_limits: Deterministic module tests do not prove browser rendering, clipboard access, audio output, or mobile behavior.
Repository source does not establish public deployment.
URL fragments may be copied or exposed by the visitor; the seed intentionally contains only normalized abstract coordinates and strengths.
